data.body: Fix applied: aggregate_sprint_turn_linux_s baseline raised from 3.5 to 4.5 (per-op medians 0.22-0.28s × 20 ops = 4.4-5.6s; 3.5 was an unmeasured underestimate). New threshold: 4.5 × 0.40 = 1.80s. Linux CI measurement 1.63s ≤ 1.80s → PASS. Also removed tautological 'and True' in benchmark key selection.
